_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_38_note: Session 38 (2026-06-01, Monday): NVDA GTC Taipei keynote captured. Key findings: (1) N1X ARM laptop chip officially launched — MediaTek co-development, TSMC N3P, 20-core ARM CPU + 6,144 Blackwell CUDA cores (RTX 5070 Ti-equivalent), 128GB LPDDR5X-8533, 180-200 AI TOPS. OEM partners: ASUS ProArt, Microsoft Surface, Dell XPS, Lenovo (Legion 7/Yoga/IdeaPad), MSI. Ships holiday 2026. CUDA on consumer laptops for first time. (2) Vera Rubin NVL72 confirmed in full production, shipping H2 2026. 36 Vera CPUs + 72 Rubin GPUs, 288GB HBM4/GPU, 1.8 TB/s NVLink-C2C, 10x perf/watt vs H100. Jensen: 'largest product launch in history of Taiwan' — 2M parts, 150 Taiwan ecosystem partners. COMPUTEX 2026 Best Choice Golden Award. (3) Constellation campus (Taipei HQ, ~4,000 employees, opens ~2030). NVIDIA $100B/yr Taiwan spend. (4) TI+NVIDIA robotics partnership. (5) Analyst consensus PT post-keynote ~$268; stock muted/range-bound. PRICE CORRECTION: ANET session 37 -4.3% trigger ($148.60 est.) was a data error. Actual May 30 close ~$155.26; June 1 intraday $159.80 (+2.93%). ANET event removed from queue. Phase 1b/1c gated (38%6=2). No DCF (NVDA last run May 21, 11 days; keynote confirms, does not change, the story). Concept pages updated: cowos.md, HBM.md.

event_queue.event: Computex June 2 joint keynote: Matt Murphy + Jensen Huang (10:30am Taipei, Nangang Exhibition Center) — 'The Future of AI Depends on Connectivity.' NVLink Fusion showcase; XConn vs ALAB head-to-head framing. Session 39: capture keynote outcome, update MRVL entity. Context: Polariton acquisition + Alphabet custom chip talks. Watch for Google TPU volume numbers and any Alphabet custom chip confirmation.

Computex June 3 press conference + Scorpio X 320-lane live demo (10-11am Taipei, TaiNEX 1 Room 303). Actual May 29 close $342.85 (corrected from $341.02 estimate). Session 39/40: capture demo outcome and hyperscaler design win announcements beyond Trainium3. First public head-to-head with MRVL XConn 260-lane switch.

Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued for post-earnings session. Prior DCF: IV $442.63, MoS -54.1%. TrendForce Q2 DRAM +58-63% confirms thesis. No deep session before June 24.

_event_queue_note: Session 38: NVDA GTC Taipei keynote captured and removed from queue. ANET event removed — session 37 -4.3% trigger was a data error (actual May 30 close ~$155.26, not $148.60). Session 39 = MRVL June 2 keynote (tomorrow). Session 40 = ALAB June 3 demo. TSM May revenue ~June 8. MU June 24 earnings.
